word: G3964 - πατραλῴας - patralṓias - pat-ral-o'-as - Murderer of fathers

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πατραλῴας

- Transliteration: Patraloas

- Phonetic: pat-ral-o'-as

- Definition:

1. a patricide

- Origin: from G3962 and the same as the latter part of G3389

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G3962 and the same as the latter part of G3389; a parricide: - murderer of fathers.
